title: How Modern Software and AI Systems Are Built: A Process-Driven Approach

practice_words.example: Actions are emphasized over individual contributors.
Architectural decisions are made based on scalability, performance, and maintainability.
Best practices are enforced through automated tools.
Data is cleaned, labeled, and validated to ensure accuracy.
Security measures are applied to protect sensitive data.
Recovery procedures are established in advance.

title: What If? A Conversation About Life, Choices, and Possibilities

practice_words.example: My future will look like something completely different if I change careers.
She wants to study abroad next year.
They are planning to travel to Europe this summer.
I thought I would have finished the project by now.
I will start working on the task right away.
I hope everything will work out in the end.
That’s definitely true.
Ideally, you should be releasing bubbles the whole time and just turning to inhale quickly.
I was reviewing job postings, looking at the most common requirements.
With your experience, it sounds like a well-thought-out decision.
As for earplugs, I ordered some from Temu and they will arrive this week, maybe tomorrow.

practice_words.word: But let me point something out
practice_words.translation: pero déjame señalar algo / pero permíteme aclarar algo
practice_words.example: But let me point something out: if you always stay there, your progress might be slower.
Are you releasing all the air right before turning your head?
Take advantage of that to move a bit further from the edge, even gradually.
Take advantage of that to move a bit further from the edge, even gradually.
They might reject you if you hesitate on answers like the ones you mentioned.
Over time, you will get more comfortable moving away from the edge of the pool.
And switching a bit… how's your day going today?
At some point, you'll need to move away from the edge a bit to build real confidence in the full movement.
And going back to today, what have you done so far?
That could help you a lot with what you're aiming for: real confidence.
